reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros, despachan rápido, no opinare del baño o demás sectores por que no lo he visto, el lugar esta limpio y ordenado, se nota que es un edifício bastante viejo, tal vez le falta una pequeña restauración.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are good and serve quickly. I won't comment on the bathroom or other areas because I haven't seen them. The place is clean and tidy; it's clearly a fairly old building and could use some minor renovations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbDRYaHpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una tristeza tiene esa estación, cuando debería ser todo lo contrario por el punto estratégico que está...

(Translated by Google)
There's a sadness to that station, when it should be the opposite, given its strategic location...

reviews.comment:
Segund recarga después de quimili y volvemos a completar generalmente en virasoro para ir con nafta argentina al Brasil, mucha aglomeracion por la temporada

(Translated by Google)
Second refueling after Quimili and we usually fill up again in Virasoro to go to Brazil with Argentine gasoline. There is a lot of congestion due to the season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMnRPSTlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El comercio tiene servicios muy buenos para el viajero, posee un camping que está rodeado de árboles. Le bajo dos estrellas ya que los baños no contaban con agua y carecía de limpieza

(Translated by Google)
The establishment offers excellent services for travelers and has a campsite surrounded by trees. I'm deducting two stars because the bathrooms lacked water and were not clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbnZfbjJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No recomiendo PARA NADA esta estacion de servicio.
1- la atención del personal es pésimo (sin ganas, actitudes soberbias como que te estan regalando la nafta) tampoco se puede abonar con débito!!!!!
2-Los baños un asco total.
3- fuimos 2 días de seguido a cargar nafta y no tenían, una vergüenza. Mucho cuidado con eso, porque desde el tramo de itati/ituzaingo es la única estación de servicio y te quedas varado.
4-el Shop carisimo y no tenes comodidades como mesas o sillas

(Translated by Google)
I absolutely do NOT recommend this gas station.

1- The staff's service is terrible (unenthusiastic, arrogant attitudes like they're giving you free gas). They also don't accept debit cards!

2- The bathrooms are disgusting.

3- We went two days in a row to fill up and they didn't have any gas, a disgrace. Be very careful, because from the Itatí/Ituzaingó stretch of road, it's the only gas station and you'll get stranded.

4- The convenience store is extremely expensive and doesn't have amenities like tables or chairs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCN29YaWdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bastante concurrido. Por ahí se quedan sin combustible, el otro lugar más cercano es Ituzaingó

(Translated by Google)

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcnYyRzh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar sencillo para una parada rápida, lo único, el pobre chico de drugstore vive adentro de un horno, pongan una caja para colecta para un aire acondicionado.
Pónganse un aire acondicionado, a ese chico con las altas temperaturas de la zona. Imposible trabajar en esas condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
Simple place for a quick stop, the only problem is, the poor drugstore guy lives inside an oven. Put out a collection box for an air conditioner. Get an air conditioner for that guy with the high temperatures in this area. It's impossible to work in those conditions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaE1xRHlBRRAB
